home.heroSubtitle: Discover incredible places, craft personalized itineraries with our AI Concierge, and connect directly with trusted guides and boutique stays. Experience the heart of the Andes like never before.
home.searchPlaceholder: e.g., 'Recommend me the best restaurant in the valley'
home.featuresSubtitle: Cusco Bienestar is an AI-powered local discovery platform connecting you directly with authentic businesses, reliable transport, and trusted services in the Sacred Valley, Peru.
home.feat1Desc: Explore the Sacred Valley through an immersive 3D map. Find exactly what you need with distinct category markers and connect directly with local business owners.
home.feat1Sub1Desc: Skip the middlemen. Tap to instantly open a WhatsApp conversation with verified local guides and businesses.
home.feat1Sub2Desc: Easily filter between boutique stays, trusted guides, local dining, and wellness retreats using intuitive map markers.
home.feat2Desc: Your personal guide to the Andes. Our intelligent assistant helps you discover the perfect experiences based on your exact location and preferences.
home.feat2Sub1Desc: Add experiences block-by-block to visually see your route mapped out for the day.
home.feat2Sub2Desc: Ask questions about altitude, local customs, or hidden gems and receive instant, localized recommendations.

navbar.quickGuide: Quick guide to planning your perfect Sacred Valley trip.
navbar.mapIconDesc: Use the unified filter in the top left of the map to select specific towns (like Pisac or Ollantaytambo) and filter by categories (Dining, Stays, Wellness, etc.).
navbar.compassIconDesc: Use Discover mode to explore points of interest across the valley. Click places to add them to your itinerary.
navbar.routeIconDesc: In the Itinerary tab, you can add, remove, and reorder stops. Set your starting and ending points by clicking them on the map.
navbar.sparklesIconDesc: Tap the Concierge button to open the chat. The AI can build an entire day for you based on your preferences, check Boleto Turístico info, and estimate taxi fares.
navbar.settingsIconDesc: Tap the settings icon to set your "Travel Vibe" and "Intensity Level". The Concierge uses this to give you highly personalized recommendations.
navbar.preferencesDesc: Set your vibe and intensity to get highly personalized recommendations from the Concierge.
navbar.intensityNote: Level 1 is relaxed and safe. Level 3 is extreme and off-the-beaten-path.

explore.locationDesc: Discover unlisted experiences, hidden gems, and fully organized itineraries in {loc}. Book directly with local providers with zero commissions.

categoryDescriptions.dining: Experience the culinary renaissance of the Andes. From traditional *picanterías* serving slow-roasted guinea pig to avant-garde restaurants blending local ingredients with modern techniques, the Sacred Valley offers a world-class dining experience.
categoryDescriptions.wellness: Reconnect with your inner self. Discover holistic spas, ancient Inca healing therapies, yoga retreats, and meditation centers nestled in the tranquil mountains of the Sacred Valley.
categoryDescriptions.adventure: Get your adrenaline pumping. The Sacred Valley is a playground for thrill-seekers, offering world-class trekking, ATV tours, white-water rafting, and zip-lining across breathtaking landscapes.
categoryDescriptions.stays: Rest in unparalleled comfort. Whether you seek a luxury eco-lodge, a boutique hotel, or a cozy family-run inn, find the perfect basecamp for your Andean explorations.
categoryDescriptions.culture: Immerse yourself in living history. Explore vibrant artisan markets, ancient ruins, traditional textile weaving centers, and interactive workshops that preserve the legacy of the Incas.

discoverPanel.emptyDesc: Try panning or zooming out the map to find more places, or clear your filters to see the whole Valley.
discoverPanel.addStop: Browse and click 'Add' on a place to add it as a stop

businessCard.boletoDesc2: It's a unified government-managed ticket allowing access to up to 16 major archaeological sites and museums in Cusco and the Sacred Valley.
businessCard.fullTicketDesc: Valid for 10 days. Includes all 16 sites across Cusco, Sacred Valley, and South Valley.
businessCard.partialTicketDesc: Valid for 1-2 days for a specific circuit (e.g., Sacred Valley ruins only).
businessCard.note: Note: The ticket cannot be purchased online in advance. It must be bought in person at the COSITUC office (Av. El Sol 103, Cusco) or at the entrance of the first site you visit.

metadata.title: How to Avoid & Heal Soroche (Altitude Sickness) in Cusco
metadata.description: A practical, natural guide to preventing and treating altitude sickness (soroche) in Cusco, Peru. Learn about Coca tea, hydration, and proper acclimatization.

sorocheGuide.title: How to Avoid & Heal Soroche (Altitude Sickness) in Cusco
sorocheGuide.desc: Cusco sits at 11,150 feet (3,400 meters) above sea level. It is completely normal to feel the altitude, but with a little preparation and traditional Andean remedies, you can enjoy your trip worry-free.
sorocheGuide.p1_1: Soroche is the local word for altitude sickness. It happens because there is less oxygen in the air at high elevations. Symptoms include mild headaches, fatigue, and shortness of breath.
sorocheGuide.l2_1_text: Your first day in Cusco should be for resting. Do not plan strenuous hikes right away.
sorocheGuide.l2_2_text: Drink much more water than usual. The mountain air is dry.
sorocheGuide.l2_3_text: Avoid heavy, fatty meals when you arrive, as digestion slows down at high altitudes.
sorocheGuide.l3_1_text: The ancient Andean remedy. Coca leaves are a mild stimulant that help with digestion and oxygenation. Drink it in the morning or afternoon.
sorocheGuide.l3_2_text: Andean mint is excellent for settling the stomach and relieving altitude symptoms.
sorocheGuide.l3_3_text: An herbal cologne used by local guides. Inhaling its scent helps open up the airways and clear the mind.
sorocheGuide.p4_1: If you have a severe headache or strong nausea, don't worry. Most hotels in Cusco have oxygen tanks at the front desk. A few minutes of oxygen is usually all it takes to feel like yourself again.
sorocheGuide.callToActionDesc: Ask our AI Concierge to design a travel plan that gradually increases in altitude, ensuring you stay healthy.
